assessor_raw: Dense embeddings for support retrieval: sound design. Temporal split with product area stratification is appropriate. Weak-label audit provides label quality calibration. Both models receive equal tuning. NDCG@5 appropriate for 5-result display. Secondary metrics (popularity correlation, per-area NDCG, temporal drift) comprehensively address confounds. One pass test set policy is rigorous. Verdict: defense_wins.
